BillingChangePreToPostBlb.clientToken: Idempotent token, no more than 64 characters in length
BillingChangePreToPostBlb.billingMethod: Billing method. "BySpec" indicates billing by fixed specification (default), "ByCapacityUnit" indicates billing by actual usage.
BillingChangePreToPostBlb.performanceLevel: Performance specification parameter, defaults to the current instance's performance level. Valid values: "small1" Standard 1, "small2" Standard 2, "medium1" Enhanced 1, "medium2" Enhanced 2, "large1" Ultra-large 1, "large2" Ultra-large 2, "large3" Ultra-large 3. Only postpaid-by-usage supports "unlimited" for no bandwidth limit.
BillingChangePreToPostBlb.effectiveImmediately: Whether to take effect immediately, defaults to false.
